allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== .env 是否被追蹤 \(應為空\) ==="; git ls-files | Select-String -Pattern "^\\.env$|\\.db$|^data/" ; Write-Output "=== 已推送的檔案數 ==="; \(git ls-files | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)

PowerShell($g = Get-Command gcloud -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { Write-Output "gcloud 已安裝: $\($g.Source\)"; gcloud --version | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "---目前帳號/專案---"; gcloud config list 2>$null } else { Write-Output "gcloud 未安裝" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== NS \(DNS 託管在哪\) ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name ikuzo-net.com -Type NS -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name,NameHost } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output "`n=== 目前 A 記錄 \(根域名\) ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name ikuzo-net.com -Type A -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name,IPAddress,Type } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output "`n=== www ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name www.ikuzo-net.com -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name,IPAddress,Type,NameHost } catch { Write-Output $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== HTTPS 首頁 ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://pay.ikuzo-net.com/" -MaximumRedirection 5 -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output \("Status: " + $r.StatusCode\); Write-Output \("Final URL: " + $r.BaseResponse.ResponseUri\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; Write-Output "`n=== /healthz ==="; try { $h = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://pay.ikuzo-net.com/healthz" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output \("Status: " + $h.StatusCode + "  Body: " + $h.Content\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
